method: Direct read-only navigation to /search/results/companies/?keywords=... + accessibility/DOM extraction. Conservative pace. First results page per query (no infinite scroll).
session: existing authenticated human session; no login/CAPTCHA/checkpoint encountered
important_finding: LinkedIn company search matches company NAMES, not described activities. Segment terms that are common in company names (Verpackungstechnik, Sondermaschinenbau, Fördertechnik) return many results; process terms that are rarely company names (Palettierung, Montageanlagen, Endverpackung) return none.

queries.note: many foreign/non-ICP results dropped (Spain, Turkey, China)
multi-word company-name search fails; use single tokens + location filter instead

additional_companies_surfaced_via: people headlines and post authors (Schnaithmann, ASYS Group, VS Sondermaschinenbau, FORM+TEST, RHV Technik, Schmid Maschinenbau, camos, Perspectix, Spanflug, dima, End-of-Line Experts, HuW Automation, VIETZ)
limitations: Per-company employee size / HQ / activity were NOT opened for every company (would exceed conservative read-only limits). Those fields are 'unknown' unless verified on a company page.
Palletizing / end-of-line as a segment is under-represented in company-name search; better reached via packaging builders' product pages and posts.
